name: Supposed to Be Keg Cheesecake (Non-bake)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Place cracker crumbs and sugar in a mixing bowl.
3. Add melted butter to the cracker crumb mixture.
4. Mix well until combined.
5. Place the crust mixture into a 10-inch spring form pan.
6. Spread evenly and pack down firmly.
7. Whip cream cheese with an electric mixer until soft and smooth.
8. Add condensed milk and blend until very smooth.
9. Blend in lemon juice and vanilla extract until thoroughly mixed.
10. Pour the blended filling into the spring-form pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
11. Place in refrigerator for 8 hours until firm.
12. Serve with fresh fruit topping, such as strawberries marinated in icing sugar and any liqueur (e.g., Grand Marnier or Amaretto).
